testcase.name: testLogoutRedirectsToLogin

failure.message: Logout action should be triggerable — logout menu item not found expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Logout action should be triggerable — logout menu item not found expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at com.ekart.tests.LogoutTest.testLogoutRedirectsToLogin(LogoutTest.java:73) at failure.message: Login or Register link should appear in the nav after logout expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.name: testSessionPersistsAcrossRefresh

failure.message: Logged-in session should survive a page refresh. Before: https://ekartms.netlify.app/login | After: https://ekartms.netlify.app/login expected [false] but found [true]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Logged-in session should survive a page refresh. Before: https://ekartms.netlify.app/login | After: https://ekartms.netlify.app/login expected [false] but found [true] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at testcase.name: testFullLoginLogoutLoginCycle

failure.message: Should be past /login after first login. URL: https://ekartms.netlify.app/login expected [false] but found [true]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Should be past /login after first login.
